title: Register the 'slow' pytest marker in pyproject.toml
body:
tests/test_demucs_wrapper.py uses @pytest.mark.slow to gate the model-download smoke test (skipped unless RUN_SLOW=1). Pytest will emit a PytestUnknownMarkWarning until the marker is registered. Please add the following to [tool.pytest.ini_options] in pyproject.toml:

  markers = [
    "slow: marks tests as slow (deselect with -m 'not slow'); enable explicitly with RUN_SLOW=1",
  ]

No Agent C code changes are required; this is a config-only ask.
